retrieval.local_snapshot_normalization: The verbatim 1753-byte facade response is stored with one terminal LF added; no other byte changed.

publication_chart_context.evidence_location: TradingView publication page embedded chart JSON
publication_chart_context.interpretation: Pine time(timeframe.period, session) omits a timezone, so TradingView evaluates the literal session strings in the chart symbol exchange timezone. The frozen source-chart interpretation is therefore America/New_York, not Darwinex broker wall-clock.

executable_mechanics_v1.pivot: ta.pivothigh/ta.pivotlow with five left and five right bars; the latest non-na value replaces lastHigh/lastLow only when confirmed. TradingView's official Operators page states that ta.pivothigh(5,5) requires five lower highs on both sides; the frozen mirror for pivot lows requires five higher lows, so equality with a neighbor is not a pivot.
executable_mechanics_v1.long_signal_same_bar: lastLow exists AND low < lastLow AND close > lastLow AND close > high[1] AND low > high[2] AND source session is active
executable_mechanics_v1.short_signal_same_bar: lastHigh exists AND high > lastHigh AND close < lastHigh AND close < low[1] AND high < low[2] AND source session is active
executable_mechanics_v1.entry: Market strategy.entry on the confirmed signal bar closing tick because process_orders_on_close=true.
executable_mechanics_v1.stop: Signal-bar low for long; signal-bar high for short.
executable_mechanics_v1.target: Entry reference close plus/minus exactly 2.0 times signal close-to-stop distance.

selection_basis: APPROVED card with direct primary-source lineage.
Open-source executable Pine fixes every sweep, displacement/MSS, FVG, pivot, session, stop and target inequality.
XAUUSD is named by the source and supplies the required metal sleeve; EURUSD is an approved-card transport used to test cross-asset robustness.
Its two New-York-time windows do not overlap retained NDX Sleeve A's 10:00-11:00 America/New_York window.
already_adjudicated_or_reserved_not_reop: QM5_20009 Sleeve A NDX/GDAX retained low-sample

alternatives_rejected_without_outcome_ac.reason: Asian-sweep source leaves HTF orderflow, POI proximity, range classification, FVG choice and target selection discretionary and overlaps a rejected Asia/London family.
Silver Bullet page/card leaves a parameter menu and overlaps already-adjudicated Silver Bullet candidates.
Forum prose required substantial discretionary mechanisation and had no exact executable primary source.
Order-block and FVG identification remained underspecified.
Break/re-entry/retest family duplicated the source-ambiguity problem already adjudicated in QM5_9987.
Pivot rejection omitted an executable displacement-plus-FVG chain.
Simple sweep omitted an executable FVG condition.

outcome_access_statement: Selection used cards, source code/page metadata, implementation metadata, timestamp prefixes, venue metadata and cost/news rules only. No selected market OHLC field, trade list, report or performance metric was read.
